 > >Description:
 > 	This patch will update print/foo2zjs to version 20061010. The port is currently unfetchable to do this recent
 > 	update, and a poor release structure. Maintainer has been CC'd
 
 I and Armin Pirkovitsch are working for solve some problems with
 foo2zjs, please you can see it at pr=103616. I'll send the update to
 portmgr@  when all things be working
